questions.question: What is the main performance advantage SSR has over CSR (Client Side Rendering)?
options: SSR eliminates the need for hydration
Users see content before JavaScript loads — faster first contentful paint
SSR servers cache responses indefinitely with no invalidation needed

questions.question: What is a key development constraint when writing SSR code in Vue?
options: You cannot use TypeScript in SSR projects
You cannot use `window`, `document`, or browser-only APIs in server-executed code
Pinia stores must be declared differently for SSR
Components must use the Options API for SSR compatibility

questions.question: For which use case would SSR NOT be recommended?
options: A marketing site that needs SEO
A dashboard behind a login that has no SEO requirements
